profiles.name: Minimal
profiles.description: 11 agents + /forge command. No skills, no hooks. Good for getting started.

profiles.name: Default
profiles.description: Full pipeline (recommended): 11 agents + 17 skills + quality hooks + rules + 2 plugin MCPs (ohmyclaude-fs + ohmyclaude-probe). Replaces v2.5.x's `standard` after the v2.6.0 ablation + v3.0.0 generator/evaluator separation.

profiles.name: Power
profiles.description: Default profile + cost-profiler hook (PROFILE-<runId>.md + baseline.json drift) + optional `code-review-graph` MCP (tree-sitter structural graph, 28 tools; requires `uv` on PATH). For plugin contributors and users running ablation campaigns.
